channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Banking app glitch briefly exposed other customers' transactions
item.description: Customers of Lloyds Bank, Halifax, and Bank of Scotland experienced a major privacy glitch when their banking apps mistakenly displayed the transactions of other users. The issue, which occurred on Th...

item.title: CHED and Landbank Launch ATM System to Streamline Scholarship Payouts for 2 Million Students
item.description: The Commission on Higher Education (CHED) and Land Bank of the Philippines have partnered to improve the distribution of government scholarships and subsidies by providing ATM cards directly to studen...

item.title: Audit reveals millions spent on failed or delayed borehole projects in Kenyan counties
item.description: The article reports on how millions of shillings earmarked for borehole projects across several Kenyan counties appear to have been lost through failed or delayed drilling exercises. According to an a...

item.title: Christine Bergeron: Pioneering Vancouver Business Leader in Sustainable Finance and Community Development
item.description: Christine Bergeron, a visionary Vancouver business leader, passed away at 51 from glioblastoma. Fresh from an MBA in strategic management, she devoted her career to using finance for positive social a...

item.title: Eldoret court jails Jackson Kibor’s son for assault in inheritance row
item.description: A court in Uasin Gishu County has sentenced Jackson Kibor’s son to three years in jail after he was found guilty of assaulting his stepmother’s sister during a heated argument over family inheritance ...

item.title: Deadloch season two filmed in Northern Territory with new characters, crocs and comedy
item.description: The Emmy-nominated Australian crime comedy series Deadloch is back for its second season, relocating from Tasmania to the Northern Territory. Co-creators Kate McCartney and Kate McLennan discovered a ...

item.title: TMC delegation's request to meet President turned down due to schedule constraints
item.description: In an unusual political development, members of the Trinamool Congress (TMC) recently sought an appointment with President Droupadi Murmu to brief her on various welfare initiatives implemented by the...

item.title: India engages Iran to secure safe transit of Indian vessels through Strait of Hormuz amid regional tensions
item.description: India is actively engaged with Iranian authorities to ensure the safe passage of around 30 Indian-flagged merchant vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, which has been effectively closed due to the on...

item.title: Elderly Tesla driver and passenger found asleep on California freeway, car on autopilot
item.description: A concerning incident occurred on Highway 4 in Pittsburg, California, when an elderly man and woman were seen asleep in the front seats of a Tesla Model 3, which appeared to be operating in autopilot ...

item.title: Senegal approves law increasing prison sentences for same-sex acts and promotion
item.description: Senegal's National Assembly recently passed a law that doubles the maximum jail term for same-sex sexual acts to 10 years. The bill also criminalises any effort to promote or support homosexuality. Th...

item.title: Food influencer Ben Wood and family die in tragic rescue attempt in Chile
item.description: Ben Wood, a 43-year-old food influencer originally from Connecticut, tragically lost his life along with his wife, Maria Jose Duarte Ureta, 47, and his father, Norman Ray Wood, 77, during an attempt t...

item.title: Ruaha University launches AI-powered website to improve student services
item.description: Ruaha Catholic University (RUCU) in Iringa has officially launched a modern website that is integrated with Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology. The new platform is designed to make it easier for ...

item.title: Trump's State Department Nominee Addresses White Culture Concerns
item.description: President Donald Trump has nominated a controversial figure to a senior role in the State Department, drawing sharp criticism due to the nominee's past statements on 'white culture.' The article detai...

item.title: Beyond Limits Beat Gateway FC 2–1 in Ogun State Derby, Keep Promotion Hopes Alive
item.description: Beyond Limits Football Academy show serious ambition for promotion to the Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) after dem beat Gateway FC 2–1 in a hotly contested Ogun State derby at the MKO Abiola S...

item.title: Four Suspects Arrested in Nueva Ecija Double Homicide Case
item.description: Four individuals were apprehended following the discovery of a man and woman’s charred bodies inside a burned car in Peñaranda, Nueva Ecija. The victims were identified as Regine Espinosa, a businessw...

item.title: Sh4.2bn Scholarship Funds to Support Continuing Students in Public Universities
item.description: Thousands of students in public universities across Kenya are set to receive financial relief as the Universities Fund announces a Sh4.2 billion scholarship disbursement. According to Dr Edwin Wanyony...

item.title: Israeli Ambassador Highlights Rising Antisemitism in Canada Following Synagogue Attack
item.description: During a visit to Beth Avraham Yoseph of Toronto, a synagogue in Thornhill, Ontario recently targeted by gunfire, Israeli Ambassador Iddo Moed described Canada as 'one of the centres of antisemitism g...

item.title: The Importance of PhD Apprenticeships in the Age of AI
item.description: The launch of ChatGPT-5 has stirred debate in academic circles, particularly about whether AI can match PhD-level research skills. While AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude Code have been successfully us...

item.title: DA and ActionSA oppose Johannesburg’s adjustment budget citing financial concerns
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has officially rejected the City of Johannesburg’s proposed adjustment budget, citing significant financial risks for the city and its residents. Speaking at a council mee...

item.title: Market Volatility Rises as Iran Conflict Challenges Trump’s Economic Narrative
item.description: Since the outbreak of the war with Iran, U.S. financial markets have experienced significant turbulence. Stocks have fallen, with the Dow dropping about 7% since its February record high, while the S&...
